step_rationale: Urokinase-type plasminogen activator; fibrinolytic enzyme and cardiac remodeling regulator.
mechanism: uPA degrades fibrin and facilitates fibrinolysis, with downregulation post-MI predicting adverse cardiac remodeling and heart failure risk.
